TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == U-al-pan-al-seÁÉŹÁąĺÁŹ≠šļĆšłĖ cen-bu-cyaw-cunng U-al-pan-al-se "kamu nu Latin, Beatus Urbanus PP. II, kamu nu Ing-kow, Pope Urban II, 1042 a mihcaan-1099 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 29 a mih caan", paabelin aca tu U-al-pan-al-se, uyaan a nganganci La-ze-liay a Aw-tow "Odo of Lagery". i Ba-kow Ma-en tukus nu sa'wac a lecuhen, ngangasawan u 1088 a mihcaan tulu a bulad 12 a demiad katukuh 1099 a mihca 7 a bulad 29 a demiad mala cyaw-cung. :Beatus Urbanus PP. IIÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:Pope Urban IIÔľõ1042ŚĻī‚ÄĒ1099ŚĻī7śúą29śó•), (Odo of Lagery). . nilaculan namala sakatusa cu-cyaw nu Lan-s , Ke-li-ni-ing-syu-s-atu yen-cang, nu satalakaway nu cu-cyaw "sumanahay ku zikuc ku cu-cyaw", Low-ma ci-yaw-hwang "1088-1099 a mihcaan", cung-se-ci nu sepatay a La-tin sipu. mala nu Low-ma cyaw-hwang hawsa palecal tu sakacecay ziwzika sulit a hitay mingayaw, balaki tu sa i Low-ma ku kalihalay mauzip. 10042 a lecuh i Ba-kow nu Ma-en tukus a sa'wac Ti-yung, nu tizaay Ma-en tukus a sa'wac nu Ti-yung u ilic nu kakitaan a luma'. saayaw i1050 a mihcaan i La-s cu-cyaway nu tabakiay a kiwkay nu cadudadan minanam, zikuz tayza I Su-wa-sung micudad, i 1055-1067 a mihcaan mala nu La-s nu pasubana'ay nu miedapay tu mikeliday nu patududay. 1070 a mihcaan miliyas tu La-s, micumud tu Ke-li-ni-ing-siw-yen mala siw-s, migingkiw tu ciwlu a cudad, zikuz mala yen-cung tu. 1079 a mihcaad ci U-al-pan-al-s kanamuhan nu ayaway a cyaw-hwang-Ke-lyeke-ci-s, mapaculcul tayza i Luma cyaw-tin mikawaw, 1084 a mihcaan nu cyaw-hwang a piculcul mumul Te-kow micuay masasuayaw tu cyaw-cung-ke-men-san-se. U-al-pan-al-s katukuh i sen-sen-Low-ma-tikow zikuz, maala ku sapilusimet tu ciwlu a kiwkay a situngus tu pasubana' atu hungti ku mikuwanay a bunday nu hekalay atu labuay. kasitungu pasubana' ci Ke-li-ke-ci-ci-s u cayay pitantanan amibaking tu cu-cyaw hamin han paales, hungti ku mikuwanay tu kawaw, mademec ku sen-sen Low-ma-tikow hungti ci Heng-li-se-se atu Ke-lay-mung-san-s atu zuma kaput. napacuwahan tuyni, ci U-al-pan-al-se mapala u sakakaay a cu-cyaw nu Aw-s-ti-ya, i 1088 a mihca 3 a bulad 12 a dimiad mala cyaw-hwang. mala cyaw-hwang sayay ci U-al-pan-al-se caay kasitungus mikuwan tu Low-ma, makuwan nu sen-senLow-ma-ti-kow hungti Heng-li-se-se atu Ke-la-mung sanse. kilul ci U-al-pan-al-se malingatu atu cyaw-hwang madademec tu icelang, 1089 a mihcaan i Si-si-li-wang-kow now-man a piading nu hitay, saayaway micumud tu Low-ma, palecapu milubang tu cung-cyaw, sakamusa mabidang u hungti ku situngusay tu kawa nu kamisama. patahkal au mikawaway tu kamisama a tademaw atu mikilulay tu kamisama ku patahkalen, uyni a pingayaw mademec, lalum asa miliyas tu Low-ma a niyazu' panaay tu a mihcaan milakalak. pilakalakan ni U-al-pan-al-se miliyung tu micukelay ci Now-man a tademaw, misaupu tu icelangay a kuwang midemec tu Ke-lay-mung-sen-s, zuma milinlaku tu labuay a ti-kow mabidang ci Henli se-se tu pikuwan tu kung-how, miliyung tu picaluk a bunday pakalakalak tu kacacayat nu malawamaay a Heng-li, u wawa ni Heng-li ci Kang-la-te i 1093 a mihcaan miliyas tuwama, i Mi-lan misakaku sakay Wang-cye atu cyaw-hwang misakaput. 1096 a mihcaan, U-al-pan-al-se malaheci ku pidemec tu ada ci Ke-lay-mung-sen-se, panukas taluma' i Low-ma, I La-te-lan-kung palecapu milubang tu cung-cyaw u ada a sakaput hamin han paales.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô***** ¶…ôn-bu- ¶jaw- ¶unŇč u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô "kamu nu r~…ĺatin, b…ôatus urbanus pp. ii, kamu nu iŇč-kow, pop…ô urban ii, **** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a mińß ¶aan", paab…ôr~…ĺin a ¶a tu u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô, ujaan a ŇčaŇčan ¶i r~…ĺa-z…ô-r~…ĺiaj a aw-tow "odo of r~…ĺag…ôrj". i ba-kow ma-…ôn tukus nu sa Ē~ °wa ¶ a r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß…ôn, ŇčaŇčasawan u **** a mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺa ¶jaw- ¶uŇč. :b…ôatus urbanus pp. ii***:pop…ô urban ii*****************), (odo of r~…ĺag…ôrj). . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan namar~…ĺa sakatusa ¶u- ¶jaw nu r~…ĺan-s , k…ô-r~…ĺi-ni-iŇč-sju-s-atu j…ôn- ¶aŇč, nu satar~…ĺakawaj nu ¶u- ¶jaw "sumanańßaj ku ziku ¶ ku ¶u- ¶jaw", r~…ĺow-ma ¶i-jaw-ńßwaŇč "****-**** a mińß ¶aan", ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i nu s…ôpataj a r~…ĺa-tin sipu. mar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺow-ma ¶jaw-ńßwaŇč ńßawsa par~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ tu saka ¶…ô ¶aj ziwzika sur~…ĺit a ńßitaj miŇčajaw, bar~…ĺaki tu sa i r~…ĺow-ma ku kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj mauzip. ***** a r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ba-kow nu ma-…ôn tukus a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ ti-juŇč, nu tizaaj ma-…ôn tukus a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu ti-juŇč u ir~…ĺi ¶ nu kakitaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. saajaw i**** a mińß ¶aan i r~…ĺa-s ¶u- ¶jawaj nu tabakiaj a kiwkaj nu ¶adudadan minanam, zikuz tajza i su-wa-suŇč mi ¶udad, i ****-**** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺa-s nu pasubana Ē~ °aj nu mi…ôdapaj tu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu patududaj. **** a mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺa-s, mi ¶umud tu k…ô-r~…ĺi-ni-iŇč-siw-j…ôn mar~…ĺa siw-s, migiŇčkiw tu ¶iwr~…ĺu a ¶udad, zikuz mar~…ĺa j…ôn- ¶uŇč tu. **** a mińß ¶aad ¶i u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s kanamuńßan nu ajawaj a ¶jaw-ńßwaŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺj…ôk…ô- ¶i-s, mapa ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ tajza i r~…ĺuma ¶jaw-tin mikawaw, **** a mińß ¶aan nu ¶jaw-ńßwaŇč a pi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ mumur~…ĺ t…ô-kow mi ¶uaj masasuajaw tu ¶jaw- ¶uŇč-k…ô-m…ôn-san-s…ô. u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s katukuńß i s…ôn-s…ôn-r~…ĺow-ma-tikow zikuz, maar~…ĺa ku sapir~…ĺusim…ôt tu ¶iwr~…ĺu a kiwkaj a situŇčus tu pasubana Ē~ ° atu ńßuŇčti ku mikuwanaj a bundaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu r~…ĺabuaj. kasituŇču pasubana Ē~ ° ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô- ¶i- ¶i-s u ¶ajaj pitantanan amibakiŇč tu ¶u- ¶jaw ńßamin ńßan paar~…ĺ…ôs, ńßuŇčti ku mikuwanaj tu kawaw, mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku s…ôn-s…ôn r~…ĺow-ma-tikow ńßuŇčti ¶i ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi-s…ô-s…ô atu k…ô-r~…ĺaj-muŇč-san-s atu zuma kaput. napa ¶uwańßan tujni, ¶i u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mapar~…ĺa u sakakaaj a ¶u- ¶jaw nu aw-s-ti-ja, i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad mar~…ĺa ¶jaw-ńßwaŇč. mar~…ĺa ¶jaw-ńßwaŇč sajaj ¶i u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô ¶aaj kasituŇčus mikuwan tu r~…ĺow-ma, makuwan nu s…ôn-s…ônr~…ĺow-ma-ti-kow ńßuŇčti ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi-s…ô-s…ô atu k…ô-r~…ĺa-muŇč sans…ô. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu atu ¶jaw-ńßwaŇč madad…ôm…ô ¶ tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan i si-si-r~…ĺi-waŇč-kow now-man a piadiŇč nu ńßitaj, saajawaj mi ¶umud tu r~…ĺow-ma, par~…ĺ…ô ¶apu mir~…ĺubaŇč tu ¶uŇč- ¶jaw, sakamusa mabidaŇč u ńßuŇčti ku situŇčusaj tu kawa nu kamisama. patańßkar~…ĺ au mikawawaj tu kamisama a tad…ômaw atu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu kamisama ku patańßkar~…ĺ…ôn, ujni a piŇčajaw mad…ôm…ô ¶, r~…ĺar~…ĺum asa mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺow-ma a nijazu Ē~ ° panaaj tu a mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak. pir~…ĺakar~…ĺakan ni u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mir~…ĺijuŇč tu mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺaj ¶i now-man a tad…ômaw, misaupu tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kuwaŇč mid…ôm…ô ¶ tu k…ô-r~…ĺaj-muŇč-s…ôn-s, zuma mir~…ĺinr~…ĺaku tu r~…ĺabuaj a ti-kow mabidaŇč ¶i ńß…ônr~…ĺi s…ô-s…ô tu pikuwan tu kuŇč-ńßow, mir~…ĺijuŇč tu pi ¶ar~…ĺuk a bundaj pakar~…ĺakar~…ĺak tu ka ¶a ¶ajat nu mar~…ĺawamaaj a ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi, u wawa ni ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi ¶i kaŇč-r~…ĺa-t…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺijas tuwama, i mi-r~…ĺan misakaku sakaj waŇč- ¶j…ô atu ¶jaw-ńßwaŇč misakaput. **** a mińß ¶aan, u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku pid…ôm…ô ¶ tu ada ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺaj-muŇč-s…ôn-s…ô, panukas tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i r~…ĺow-ma, i r~…ĺa-t…ô-r~…ĺan-kuŇč par~…ĺ…ô ¶apu mir~…ĺubaŇč tu ¶uŇč- ¶jaw u ada a sakaput ńßamin ńßan paar~…ĺ…ôs.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == U-al-pan-al-seÁÉŹÁąĺÁŹ≠šļĆšłĖ cen-bu-cyaw-cunng U-al-pan-al-se "kamu nu Latin, Beatus Urbanus PP. II, kamu nu Ing-kow, Pope Urban II, 1042 a mihcaan-1099 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 29 a mih caan", paabelin aca tu U-al-pan-al-se, uyaan a nganganci La-ze-liay a Aw-tow "Odo of Lagery". i Ba-kow Ma-en tukus nu sa'wac a lecuhen, ngangasawan u 1088 a mihcaan tulu a bulad 12 a demiad katukuh 1099 a mihca 7 a bulad 29 a demiad mala cyaw-cung. :Beatus Urbanus PP. IIÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:Pope Urban IIÔľõ1042ŚĻī‚ÄĒ1099ŚĻī7śúą29śó•), (Odo of Lagery). . nilaculan namala sakatusa cu-cyaw nu Lan-s , Ke-li-ni-ing-syu-s-atu yen-cang, nu satalakaway nu cu-cyaw "sumanahay ku zikuc ku cu-cyaw", Low-ma ci-yaw-hwang "1088-1099 a mihcaan", cung-se-ci nu sepatay a La-tin sipu. mala nu Low-ma cyaw-hwang hawsa palecal tu sakacecay ziwzika sulit a hitay mingayaw, balaki tu sa i Low-ma ku kalihalay mauzip. 10042 a lecuh i Ba-kow nu Ma-en tukus a sa'wac Ti-yung, nu tizaay Ma-en tukus a sa'wac nu Ti-yung u ilic nu kakitaan a luma'. saayaw i1050 a mihcaan i La-s cu-cyaway nu tabakiay a kiwkay nu cadudadan minanam, zikuz tayza I Su-wa-sung micudad, i 1055-1067 a mihcaan mala nu La-s nu pasubana'ay nu miedapay tu mikeliday nu patududay. 1070 a mihcaan miliyas tu La-s, micumud tu Ke-li-ni-ing-siw-yen mala siw-s, migingkiw tu ciwlu a cudad, zikuz mala yen-cung tu. 1079 a mihcaad ci U-al-pan-al-s kanamuhan nu ayaway a cyaw-hwang-Ke-lyeke-ci-s, mapaculcul tayza i Luma cyaw-tin mikawaw, 1084 a mihcaan nu cyaw-hwang a piculcul mumul Te-kow micuay masasuayaw tu cyaw-cung-ke-men-san-se. U-al-pan-al-s katukuh i sen-sen-Low-ma-tikow zikuz, maala ku sapilusimet tu ciwlu a kiwkay a situngus tu pasubana' atu hungti ku mikuwanay a bunday nu hekalay atu labuay. kasitungu pasubana' ci Ke-li-ke-ci-ci-s u cayay pitantanan amibaking tu cu-cyaw hamin han paales, hungti ku mikuwanay tu kawaw, mademec ku sen-sen Low-ma-tikow hungti ci Heng-li-se-se atu Ke-lay-mung-san-s atu zuma kaput. napacuwahan tuyni, ci U-al-pan-al-se mapala u sakakaay a cu-cyaw nu Aw-s-ti-ya, i 1088 a mihca 3 a bulad 12 a dimiad mala cyaw-hwang. mala cyaw-hwang sayay ci U-al-pan-al-se caay kasitungus mikuwan tu Low-ma, makuwan nu sen-senLow-ma-ti-kow hungti Heng-li-se-se atu Ke-la-mung sanse. kilul ci U-al-pan-al-se malingatu atu cyaw-hwang madademec tu icelang, 1089 a mihcaan i Si-si-li-wang-kow now-man a piading nu hitay, saayaway micumud tu Low-ma, palecapu milubang tu cung-cyaw, sakamusa mabidang u hungti ku situngusay tu kawa nu kamisama. patahkal au mikawaway tu kamisama a tademaw atu mikilulay tu kamisama ku patahkalen, uyni a pingayaw mademec, lalum asa miliyas tu Low-ma a niyazu' panaay tu a mihcaan milakalak. pilakalakan ni U-al-pan-al-se miliyung tu micukelay ci Now-man a tademaw, misaupu tu icelangay a kuwang midemec tu Ke-lay-mung-sen-s, zuma milinlaku tu labuay a ti-kow mabidang ci Henli se-se tu pikuwan tu kung-how, miliyung tu picaluk a bunday pakalakalak tu kacacayat nu malawamaay a Heng-li, u wawa ni Heng-li ci Kang-la-te i 1093 a mihcaan miliyas tuwama, i Mi-lan misakaku sakay Wang-cye atu cyaw-hwang misakaput. 1096 a mihcaan, U-al-pan-al-se malaheci ku pidemec tu ada ci Ke-lay-mung-sen-se, panukas taluma' i Low-ma, I La-te-lan-kung palecapu milubang tu cung-cyaw u ada a sakaput hamin han paales.

¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan i si-si-r~…ĺi-waŇč-kow now-man a piadiŇč nu ńßitaj, saajawaj mi ¶umud tu r~…ĺow-ma, par~…ĺ…ô ¶apu mir~…ĺubaŇč tu ¶uŇč- ¶jaw, sakamusa mabidaŇč u ńßuŇčti ku situŇčusaj tu kawa nu kamisama. patańßkar~…ĺ au mikawawaj tu kamisama a tad…ômaw atu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu kamisama ku patańßkar~…ĺ…ôn, ujni a piŇčajaw mad…ôm…ô ¶, r~…ĺar~…ĺum asa mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺow-ma a nijazu Ē~ ° panaaj tu a mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak. pir~…ĺakar~…ĺakan ni u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mir~…ĺijuŇč tu mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺaj ¶i now-man a tad…ômaw, misaupu tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kuwaŇč mid…ôm…ô ¶ tu k…ô-r~…ĺaj-muŇč-s…ôn-s, zuma mir~…ĺinr~…ĺaku tu r~…ĺabuaj a ti-kow mabidaŇč ¶i ńß…ônr~…ĺi s…ô-s…ô tu pikuwan tu kuŇč-ńßow, mir~…ĺijuŇč tu pi ¶ar~…ĺuk a bundaj pakar~…ĺakar~…ĺak tu ka ¶a ¶ajat nu mar~…ĺawamaaj a ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi, u wawa ni ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi ¶i kaŇč-r~…ĺa-t…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺijas tuwama, i mi-r~…ĺan misakaku sakaj waŇč- ¶j…ô atu ¶jaw-ńßwaŇč misakaput. **** a mińß ¶aan, u-ar~…ĺ-pan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku pid…ôm…ô ¶ tu ada ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺaj-muŇč-s…ôn-s…ô, panukas tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i r~…ĺow-ma, i r~…ĺa-t…ô-r~…ĺan-kuŇč par~…ĺ…ô ¶apu mir~…ĺubaŇč tu ¶uŇč- ¶jaw u ada a
